title: fix podman top missing output flake
body:
Sometimes there is no output displayed from the podman top command but no error is shown either. Looking at the code I think the issue here is that we do not wait for the output reader to end as it runs in a different goroutine. Thus the last lines of output might be missing.

The fix is simply to wait for said goroutine to finish before returning. While at it also fix the missing scanner error check and log possible errors.

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED] It is a flake.

Fixes #19504

comments.body: I've run this 7-8 times on #17831 without seeing the `ps(1)` flake. LGTM.
